# Eldritch horrors

Inspiration count: 12
Inspirations: H. P. Lovecraft (../Inspirations/H%20P%20Lovecraft%208b960aeb87da4d2c816e0219335869e4.md), The Darkest Dungeon (../Inspirations/The%20Darkest%20Dungeon%20df3ac67f75374c4aa1634a7575916828.md), Gantz (../Inspirations/Gantz%20a24f02cf50174af3a4c065855e47ba14.md), Mordheim (../Inspirations/Mordheim%20e6b55f683b5849d8a23bbbf0b219411b.md), In the Mouth of Madness (../Inspirations/In%20the%20Mouth%20of%20Madness%203a3a45e2b9d4455e94e3101a5eafa8ae.md), Sapphire and Steel (../Inspirations/Sapphire%20and%20Steel%20f4522f813fe047fe9cc7daef159bed6d.md), Alan Wake (../Inspirations/Alan%20Wake%200e04bd5170f74a378ff7c68afe4843e3.md), Jonathan Strange & Mr. Norrell (../Inspirations/Jonathan%20Strange%20&%20Mr%20Norrell%20ed711545bad14b739e7b27fb6ad5c1a3.md), Unforgiving - A Northern Hymn (../Inspirations/Unforgiving%20-%20A%20Northern%20Hymn%2096547461fbf64fbfb5f3a64d86e132c0.md), Discworld series (../Inspirations/Discworld%20series%20541909be433a442f8c7ed51c3ce5f0fc.md), Doctor Who (../Inspirations/Doctor%20Who%2027d58e628ba28012bd49c9bb9d4e613f.md), Silent Hill (../Inspirations/Silent%20Hill%202a458e628ba28059b174ede173d12c5f.md)
Status: Applicable

<aside>
💡 This also covers “alien horrors”, but I’m grouping both under Eldritch horrors because that’s more compatible with a fantasy setting.

</aside>
